===== moon.pkg =====
import {
  "example/canonical/model",
  "KKKIIO/selene/app",
  "KKKIIO/selene/ecs",
  "KKKIIO/selene/entity",
  "KKKIIO/selene/event",
  "KKKIIO/selene/system",
  "KKKIIO/selene_xaml_runtime/component_host",
  "KKKIIO/selene_xaml_runtime/ui_host",
  "moonbitlang/core/string",
}

supported_targets = "native+js"

===== state.generated.mbt =====
// Generated by selene-xaml@0.1.0. DO NOT EDIT.
// lock-format: 1
// input user fixtures/formatting/acceptance-view.xaml sha256=72e2f3a1802a0c085a14e87ec579c1ca21940e5729054d0e492948266458e2a2
// input moon-info fixtures/formatting/canonical-model.mbti sha256=65eb35037c6f705e3b84507853448e53987270d67a39747e91156d6471f2cf14

///|
pub type CanonicalFormattingItem = @model.CanonicalFormattingItem

///|
pub type CanonicalFormattingPatch = @model.CanonicalFormattingPatch

///|
pub type CanonicalFormattingState = @model.CanonicalFormattingState

===== view.generated.mbt =====
// Generated by selene-xaml@0.1.0. DO NOT EDIT.
// lock-format: 1
// input user fixtures/formatting/acceptance-view.xaml sha256=72e2f3a1802a0c085a14e87ec579c1ca21940e5729054d0e492948266458e2a2
// input moon-info fixtures/formatting/canonical-model.mbti sha256=65eb35037c6f705e3b84507853448e53987270d67a39747e91156d6471f2cf14

///|
pub(all) enum CanonicalFormattingViewAction {
  SelectItem(String)
} derive(Eq, Debug)

///|
pub(all) suberror CanonicalFormattingViewError {
  AlreadyMounted
  NotMounted
  DeadEntity
  DuplicateKey(String, String)
  InvalidPatch(String)
  Host(@ui_host.HostError)
} derive(Eq, Debug)

///|
pub impl Show for CanonicalFormattingViewError with fn output(self, logger) {
  match self {
    AlreadyMounted =>
      logger.write_string("view is already mounted on this entity")
    NotMounted => logger.write_string("view is not mounted on this entity")
    DeadEntity => logger.write_string("view entity is not alive")
    DuplicateKey(path, key) =>
      logger.write_string("duplicate or empty key in " + path + ": " + key)
    InvalidPatch(message) => logger.write_string(message)
    Host(error) => logger.write_string(error.to_string())
  }
}

///|
fn generated_compute_view_model(
  model : CanonicalFormattingState,
) -> CanonicalFormattingState {
  model
}

///|
#warnings("-unused_value")
fn generated_rect_component(
  value : String,
  index : Int,
  path : String,
) -> Double raise CanonicalFormattingViewError {
  let parts = value.split(" ").filter(part => part != "").collect()
  let selected = match parts.length() {
    1 => parts[0]
    2 => if index == 0 || index == 2 { parts[1] } else { parts[0] }
    4 =>
      match index {
        0 => parts[3]
        1 => parts[0]
        2 => parts[1]
        _ => parts[2]
      }
    _ => raise InvalidPatch("invalid rect value for " + path + ": " + value)
  }
  @string.parse_double(selected) catch {
    _ =>
      raise InvalidPatch(
        "invalid number for " + path + ": " + selected.to_owned(),
      )
  }
}

///|
fn generated_contains(specs : Array[@ui_host.NodeSpec], key : String) -> Bool {
  for spec in specs {
    if spec.key == key {
      return true
    }
  }
  false
}

///|
fn generated_parent_index(
  specs : Array[@ui_host.NodeSpec],
  parent : String?,
  key : String,
) -> Int {
  let mut sibling_index = 0
  for spec in specs {
    if spec.parent == parent {
      if spec.key == key {
        return sibling_index
      }
      sibling_index += 1
    }
  }
  -1
}

///|
fn generated_diff(
  previous : Array[@ui_host.NodeSpec],
  desired : Array[@ui_host.NodeSpec],
) -> Array[@ui_host.TreeMutation] {
  if previous == desired {
    return []
  }
  let previous_by_key : Map[String, @ui_host.NodeSpec] = Map([])
  let desired_by_key : Map[String, @ui_host.NodeSpec] = Map([])
  for spec in previous {
    previous_by_key[spec.key] = spec
  }
  for spec in desired {
    desired_by_key[spec.key] = spec
  }
  let mutations : Array[@ui_host.TreeMutation] = []
  for spec in previous {
    if !desired_by_key.contains(spec.key) {
      let removed_root = match spec.parent {
        Some(parent) => desired_by_key.contains(parent)
        None => true
      }
      if removed_root {
        mutations.push(@ui_host.TreeMutation::Remove(spec.key))
      }
    }
  }
  for spec in desired {
    match previous_by_key.get(spec.key) {
      None => {
        mutations.push(@ui_host.TreeMutation::Mount(spec))
        match spec.parent {
          Some(parent) =>
            mutations.push(
              @ui_host.TreeMutation::Move(
                spec.key,
                parent,
                generated_parent_index(desired, spec.parent, spec.key),
              ),
            )
          None => ()
        }
      }
      Some(old) => {
        let moved = old.parent != spec.parent ||
          generated_parent_index(previous, old.parent, old.key) !=
          generated_parent_index(desired, spec.parent, spec.key)
        match spec.parent {
          Some(parent) if moved =>
            mutations.push(
              @ui_host.TreeMutation::Move(
                spec.key,
                parent,
                generated_parent_index(desired, spec.parent, spec.key),
              ),
            )
          _ => ()
        }
        let precise_old = {
          ..old,
          parent: spec.parent,
          text: spec.text,
          source: spec.source,
          active: spec.active,
          enabled: spec.enabled,
          style: {
            ..old.style,
            background: spec.style.background,
            top: spec.style.top,
          },
        }
        if precise_old != spec {
          mutations.push(@ui_host.TreeMutation::Update(spec))
        } else {
          if old.text != spec.text {
            mutations.push(@ui_host.TreeMutation::SetText(spec.key, spec.text))
          }
          if old.source != spec.source {
            mutations.push(
              @ui_host.TreeMutation::SetSource(spec.key, spec.source),
            )
          }
          if old.style.background != spec.style.background {
            mutations.push(
              @ui_host.TreeMutation::SetBackground(
                spec.key,
                spec.style.background,
              ),
            )
          }
          if old.active != spec.active {
            mutations.push(
              @ui_host.TreeMutation::SetActive(spec.key, spec.active),
            )
          }
          if old.enabled != spec.enabled {
            mutations.push(
              @ui_host.TreeMutation::SetEnabled(spec.key, spec.enabled),
            )
          }
          if old.style.top != spec.style.top {
            mutations.push(
              @ui_host.TreeMutation::SetTop(spec.key, spec.style.top),
            )
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
  mutations
}

///|
#warnings("-struct_never_constructed")
pub struct CanonicalFormattingView {}

///|
priv struct GeneratedViewRecord {
  mut model : CanonicalFormattingState
  mut view_model : CanonicalFormattingState
  mut specs : Array[@ui_host.NodeSpec]
}

///|
let generated_view_records : Map[@entity.Entity, GeneratedViewRecord] = Map([])

///|
pub(all) struct CanonicalFormattingViewActionEvent {
  entity : @entity.Entity
  action : CanonicalFormattingViewAction
}

///|
pub let action_event_bus : @event.Events[CanonicalFormattingViewActionEvent] = @event.Events()

///|
let generated_event_reader : @event.EventReader[
  @component_host.UiComponentEvent,
] = @event.EventReader()

///|
fn generated_specs(
  state : CanonicalFormattingState,
) -> Array[@ui_host.NodeSpec] raise CanonicalFormattingViewError {
  let nodes : Array[@ui_host.NodeSpec] = []
  nodes.push({
    key: "extraordinarily-long-formatting-acceptance-root",
    parent: None,
    kind: @ui_host.NodeKind::View,
    text: "",
    source: "",
    active: true,
    enabled: true,
    focusable: false,
    style: {
      absolute: false,
      left: 0.0,
      top: 0.0,
      width: @ui_host.LayoutValue::Auto,
      height: @ui_host.LayoutValue::Auto,
      margin_left: 0.0,
      margin_top: 0.0,
      margin_right: 0.0,
      margin_bottom: 0.0,
      padding_left: 0.0,
      padding_top: 0.0,
      padding_right: 0.0,
      padding_bottom: 0.0,
      background: "",
      border_color: "",
      border: 0.0,
      radius: 0.0,
      outline_color: "",
      outline_width: 0.0,
      outline_offset: 0.0,
      color: "",
      font_family: "",
      font_size: 0.0,
      bold: false,
      align: @ui_host.TextAlign::Left,
      wrap: false,
      z_index: 0,
      fit: @ui_host.ImageFit::Fill,
      direction: @ui_host.FlexDirection::Column,
      flex_basis: @ui_host.LayoutValue::Auto,
      flex_grow: 0.0,
      flex_shrink: 1.0,
      row_gap: 0.0,
      column_gap: 0.0,
      horizontal_scroll: false,
      vertical_scroll: false,
      scrollbar_width: 0.0,
    },
    visual_state_groups: [],
  })
  let generated_seen_1 : Map[String, Bool] = Map([])
  for generated_item_1 in state.items {
    let generated_item_key_1 = generated_item_1.id
    if generated_item_key_1 == "" ||
      generated_seen_1.contains(generated_item_key_1) {
      raise DuplicateKey("items", generated_item_key_1)
    }
    generated_seen_1[generated_item_key_1] = true
    nodes.push({
      key: "extraordinarily-long-formatting-acceptance-root/items:\{generated_item_key_1}/extraordinarily-long-formatting-acceptance-button",
      parent: Some("extraordinarily-long-formatting-acceptance-root"),
      kind: @ui_host.NodeKind::Button,
      text: "",
      source: "",
      active: true,
      enabled: true,
      focusable: true,
      style: {
        absolute: false,
        left: 0.0,
        top: 0.0,
        width: @ui_host.LayoutValue::Auto,
        height: @ui_host.LayoutValue::Auto,
        margin_left: 4,
        margin_top: 1,
        margin_right: 2,
        margin_bottom: 3,
        padding_left: 0.0,
        padding_top: 0.0,
        padding_right: 0.0,
        padding_bottom: 0.0,
        background: "",
        border_color: "",
        border: 0.0,
        radius: 0.0,
        outline_color: "",
        outline_width: 0.0,
        outline_offset: 0.0,
        color: "",
        font_family: "",
        font_size: 0.0,
        bold: false,
        align: @ui_host.TextAlign::Left,
        wrap: false,
        z_index: 0,
        fit: @ui_host.ImageFit::Fill,
        direction: @ui_host.FlexDirection::Column,
        flex_basis: @ui_host.LayoutValue::Auto,
        flex_grow: 0.0,
        flex_shrink: 1.0,
        row_gap: 0.0,
        column_gap: 0.0,
        horizontal_scroll: false,
        vertical_scroll: false,
        scrollbar_width: 0.0,
      },
      visual_state_groups: [],
    })
    nodes.push({
      key: "extraordinarily-long-formatting-acceptance-root/items:\{generated_item_key_1}/extraordinarily-long-formatting-acceptance-label",
      parent: Some(
        "extraordinarily-long-formatting-acceptance-root/items:\{generated_item_key_1}/extraordinarily-long-formatting-acceptance-button",
      ),
      kind: @ui_host.NodeKind::Text,
      text: generated_item_1.label,
      source: "",
      active: true,
      enabled: true,
      focusable: false,
      style: {
        absolute: false,
        left: 0.0,
        top: 0.0,
        width: @ui_host.LayoutValue::Auto,
        height: @ui_host.LayoutValue::Auto,
        margin_left: 0.0,
        margin_top: 0.0,
        margin_right: 0.0,
        margin_bottom: 0.0,
        padding_left: 0.0,
        padding_top: 0.0,
        padding_right: 0.0,
        padding_bottom: 0.0,
        background: "",
        border_color: "",
        border: 0.0,
        radius: 0.0,
        outline_color: "",
        outline_width: 0.0,
        outline_offset: 0.0,
        color: "",
        font_family: "",
        font_size: 0.0,
        bold: false,
        align: @ui_host.TextAlign::Left,
        wrap: false,
        z_index: 0,
        fit: @ui_host.ImageFit::Fill,
        direction: @ui_host.FlexDirection::Column,
        flex_basis: @ui_host.LayoutValue::Auto,
        flex_grow: 0.0,
        flex_shrink: 1.0,
        row_gap: 0.0,
        column_gap: 0.0,
        horizontal_scroll: false,
        vertical_scroll: false,
        scrollbar_width: 0.0,
      },
      visual_state_groups: [],
    })
  }
  nodes
}

///|
pub fn CanonicalFormattingView::mount(
  entity : @entity.Entity,
  model : CanonicalFormattingState,
) -> Unit raise CanonicalFormattingViewError {
  if !entity.is_alive() {
    raise DeadEntity
  }
  if generated_view_records.contains(entity) {
    raise AlreadyMounted
  }
  let view_model = generated_compute_view_model(model)
  let desired = generated_specs(view_model)
  let host = @component_host.SeleneHost::new()
  host.mount(entity, desired) catch {
    error => raise Host(error)
  }
  generated_view_records[entity] = { model, view_model, specs: desired }
}

///|
pub fn CanonicalFormattingView::replace(
  entity : @entity.Entity,
  model : CanonicalFormattingState,
) -> Unit raise CanonicalFormattingViewError {
  let record = match generated_view_records.get(entity) {
    Some(value) => value
    None => raise NotMounted
  }
  if !entity.is_alive() {
    generated_view_records.remove(entity)
    raise DeadEntity
  }
  let view_model = generated_compute_view_model(model)
  let desired = generated_specs(view_model)
  let mutations = generated_diff(record.specs, desired)
  if mutations.length() > 0 {
    let host = @component_host.SeleneHost::new()
    host.apply(entity, mutations) catch {
      error => raise Host(error)
    }
  }
  record.model = model
  record.view_model = view_model
  record.specs = desired
}

///|
pub fn CanonicalFormattingView::apply(
  entity : @entity.Entity,
  patches : Array[CanonicalFormattingPatch],
) -> Unit raise CanonicalFormattingViewError {
  let record = match generated_view_records.get(entity) {
    Some(value) => value
    None => raise NotMounted
  }
  let mut items = record.model.items.copy()
  for patch in patches {
    match patch {
      CanonicalFormattingPatch::ItemsReplace(values) => items = values.copy()
      CanonicalFormattingPatch::ItemUpsert(value) => {
        let mut replaced = false
        for index, current in items {
          if current.id == value.id {
            items[index] = value
            replaced = true
            break
          }
        }
        if !replaced {
          items.push(value)
        }
      }
      CanonicalFormattingPatch::ItemRemove(key) => {
        let mut removed = false
        for value in items {
          if value.id == key {
            removed = true
            break
          }
        }
        if !removed {
          raise InvalidPatch(
            "patch remove key does not exist: " + key.to_string(),
          )
        }
        items = items.filter(value => value.id != key)
      }
      CanonicalFormattingPatch::ItemMove((key, destination)) => {
        let retained : Array[CanonicalFormattingItem] = []
        let mut moved : CanonicalFormattingItem? = None
        for value in items {
          if value.id == key {
            moved = Some(value)
          } else {
            retained.push(value)
          }
        }
        guard moved is Some(value) else {
          raise InvalidPatch(
            "patch move key does not exist: " + key.to_string(),
          )
        }
        let destination = destination.reinterpret_as_int()
        if destination < 0 || destination > retained.length() {
          raise InvalidPatch("patch move destination is out of range")
        }
        retained.insert(destination, value)
        items = retained
      }
    }
  }
  CanonicalFormattingView::replace(entity, { ..record.model, items, })
}

///|
fn generated_handle_event(
  record : GeneratedViewRecord,
  event : @ui_host.UiEvent,
) -> CanonicalFormattingViewAction? {
  if !generated_contains(record.specs, event.key) {
    return None
  }
  if event.kind == @ui_host.UiEventKind::Click {
    for generated_action_item in record.view_model.items {
      let generated_action_key = generated_action_item.id
      let generated_action_node_key = "extraordinarily-long-formatting-acceptance-root/items:\{generated_action_key}/extraordinarily-long-formatting-acceptance-button"
      if event.key == generated_action_node_key {
        return Some(
          CanonicalFormattingViewAction::SelectItem(generated_action_key),
        )
      }
    }
  }
  None
}

///|
fn generated_route_events(_world : @ecs.World) -> Unit {
  let dead : Array[@entity.Entity] = []
  for entity, _ in generated_view_records {
    if !entity.is_alive() {
      dead.push(entity)
    }
  }
  for entity in dead {
    generated_view_records.remove(entity)
  }
  for raw in generated_event_reader.read(@component_host.component_event_bus) {
    match generated_view_records.get(raw.entity) {
      Some(record) =>
        match generated_handle_event(record, raw.event) {
          Some(action) => action_event_bus.send({ entity: raw.entity, action })
          None => ()
        }
      None => ()
    }
  }
}

///|
pub fn plugin(app : @app.App) -> @app.App {
  app
  .add_plugin(@component_host.plugin)
  .add_message(action_event_bus)
  .add_system(
    @system.PostUpdate,
    generated_route_events,
    system_name="selene_xaml_CanonicalFormattingView_events",
  )
}

===== view.generated.mbt.map.json =====
{
  "mappings": [
    {
      "source": "fixtures/formatting/acceptance-view.xaml",
      "original_offset": 349,
      "generated_offset": 7980,
      "length": 11
    },
    {
      "source": "fixtures/formatting/acceptance-view.xaml",
      "original_offset": 387,
      "generated_offset": 8025,
      "length": 19
    },
    {
      "source": "fixtures/formatting/acceptance-view.xaml",
      "original_offset": 671,
      "generated_offset": 10088,
      "length": 22
    }
  ]
}

===== selene-xaml.lock.json =====
{
  "format_version": 1,
  "generator": "selene-xaml@0.1.0",
  "runtime": "KKKIIO/selene",
  "inputs": [
    { "owner": "user", "path": "fixtures/formatting/acceptance-view.xaml", "sha256": "72e2f3a1802a0c085a14e87ec579c1ca21940e5729054d0e492948266458e2a2" },
    { "owner": "moon-info", "path": "fixtures/formatting/canonical-model.mbti", "sha256": "65eb35037c6f705e3b84507853448e53987270d67a39747e91156d6471f2cf14" }
  ],
  "resolved_contract": { "kind": "mbti", "path": "fixtures/formatting/canonical-model.mbti", "package": "example/canonical/model", "sha256": "65eb35037c6f705e3b84507853448e53987270d67a39747e91156d6471f2cf14" },
  "requested_outputs": ["moon.pkg", "state.generated.mbt", "view.generated.mbt", "view.generated.mbt.map.json", "selene-xaml.lock.json"],
  "output_naming": { "package_directory": ".", "state": "state.generated.mbt", "view": "view.generated.mbt", "source_map": "view.generated.mbt.map.json", "lock": "selene-xaml.lock.json" },
  "package_alias": { "alias": "model", "package": "example/canonical/model" },
  "imported_sidecars": [],
  "host_capability": { "package": "KKKIIO/selene_xaml_runtime/ui_host", "contract": "component-host", "version": "0.1.0", "operations": ["mount", "apply"] },
  "abi_fingerprint": "sha256:3926e00c85c6436f1362617aba7dff05e55621bb60cf2ac656a167dc9ae36e19",
  "outputs": [    { "owner": "selene-xaml", "path": "moon.pkg", "sha256": "2f9636b78ec981118d3378de09e6005d1ce617f850cd42228da26d32c6d4b6a9" },
    { "owner": "selene-xaml", "path": "state.generated.mbt", "sha256": "51f9793c93aa8c2c12777050eee1c8f57be44b4cbcf42f00b48247a47fb8bba3" },
    { "owner": "selene-xaml", "path": "view.generated.mbt", "sha256": "62cb1ded34d3994502af5b30b0970210b34b63d7aa49e39e28c5d3a0a20176d8" },
    { "owner": "selene-xaml", "path": "view.generated.mbt.map.json", "sha256": "f8642a9b1b66ffda104c90a6850a6b6130872cfc15daaa799503ec1c0465dbab" }
  ],
  "lock_path": "selene-xaml.lock.json"
}
